'''ngarara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherer|featherer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherer|featherer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngarara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæræræth|ngæræræth]] || [[word:ngæræræj|ngæræræj]] || [[word:ngæræræsh|ngæræræsh]] || [[word:ngæræræ|ngæræræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngarararath|ngarararath]] || [[word:ngarararaj|ngarararaj]] || [[word:ngarararash|ngarararash]] || [[word:ngararara|ngararara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngararath|ngararath]] || [[word:ngararaj|ngararaj]] || [[word:ngararash|ngararash]] || [[word:ngarara|ngarara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngarafrath|ngarafrath]] || [[word:ngarafraj|ngarafraj]] || [[word:ngarafrash|ngarafrash]] || [[word:ngarafraf|ngarafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngararatha|ngararatha]] || [[word:ngararaja|ngararaja]] || [[word:ngararasha|ngararasha]] || [[word:ngararaka|ngararaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngararath|ngararath]] || [[word:ngararaj|ngararaj]] || [[word:ngararash|ngararash]] || [[word:ngarara|ngarara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngararathal|ngararathal]] || [[word:ngararajal|ngararajal]] || [[word:ngararashal|ngararashal]] || [[word:ngararakal|ngararakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngararathatha|ngararathatha]] || [[word:ngararajaja|ngararajaja]] || [[word:ngararashasha|ngararashasha]] || [[word:ngararaka|ngararaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngararathan|ngararathan]] || [[word:ngararajan|ngararajan]] || [[word:ngararashan|ngararashan]] || [[word:ngararakan|ngararakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngararathaoro|ngararathaoro]] || [[word:ngararajaoro|ngararajaoro]] || [[word:ngararashaoro|ngararashaoro]] || [[word:ngararakaoro|ngararakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
